title: Close task-pull multi-instance coordination gap
goal: Use source-backed evidence to close the remaining multi-instance coordination gap for task-pull: queue claim fairness, runner ownership recovery, and multi-runner scheduling semantics, or explicitly reclassify any part as an external blocker with proof.
forbidden_scope: No Prisma schema or migration unless current code/tests prove the gap cannot be closed without it.
No speculative scheduling feature beyond the documented multi-instance coordination gap.
acceptance: A source graph identifies the current claim/lock/runner ownership behavior and exact missing multi-instance semantics.
The gap is closed with focused code/tests or explicitly reclassified as an external blocker with concrete evidence.
API type-check/build and hygiene checks pass for touched files.
Docs and board sync are completed.
verification_commands: API type-check and build if API source changes.
Prettier, JSON/event parsing, diff hygiene, and production line-count checks.
review_gate: Multi-instance safety review: claim fairness, lock ownership, stale owner recovery, and backward-compatible default-off behavior.
